evals.name: client-slide-deck
evals.prompt: Create a slide deck presentation about the MCP Registry for a client audience. The goal is to explain why enterprises need governed MCP server management and how RHOAI solves it. Use features/mcp-registry/knowledge/ for context.
evals.expected_output: A polished slide deck HTML file with Red Hat branding, keyboard navigation, architecture diagram, multiple slides covering problem/solution/architecture/roadmap/CTA

evals.name: engineering-scrolling-page
evals.prompt: I need a vertical scrolling overview page for the MCP Gateway targeting our engineering team. It should cover the Envoy ext_proc architecture, the broker pattern, and the Kubernetes controller. Reference features/mcp-gateway/ for technical context.
evals.expected_output: A vertical scrolling HTML page with fixed nav, scroll animations, technical architecture diagrams, deep engineering content about ext_proc/broker/controller

evals.name: update-existing-presentation
evals.prompt: Update the MCP Gateway presentation at features/mcp-gateway/enablement/mcp-gateway-presentation/index.html — add a new slide after the architecture slide that shows the MCP ingestion pipeline as a step-by-step flow diagram.
evals.expected_output: An updated version of the existing presentation with a new ingestion pipeline slide inserted after architecture, matching existing style
